blended.narrative: Mt. Seymour is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 7 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 978 ft. Looking ahead, 13 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 3.3" of snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Tomorrow: 7" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Monday: 5" of snow, highs of 38°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
